goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'cherry hinton water play'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 12:00' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called cherry hinton water play
Make sure you get attraction type
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:00 and should leave on thursday
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from broxbourne
